harnesses.title: Agent Harnesses
harnesses.footerHint: Installed harnesses appear as quick-launch options in your terminal + button

launchSettings.title: Launch options
launchSettings.description: Flags appended whenever {{name}} opens in a terminal

descriptions.codex: OpenAI's coding agent CLI, integrated natively with Panes chat and terminal workflows
descriptions.claude-code: Anthropic's coding CLI, integrated natively with Panes for repo-aware and terminal-driven workflows
descriptions.gemini-cli: Google's coding agent CLI, now discontinued for free tier accounts (Enterprise and Cloud licenses still supported)
descriptions.antigravity: Google's terminal agent CLI, the successor to Gemini CLI with unified reasoning and subagent orchestration
descriptions.kiro: AWS's coding CLI focused on structured, agent-style development workflows
descriptions.opencode: Open-source coding assistant for chat, edits, and terminal workflows
descriptions.kilo-code: Lightweight coding assistant CLI for everyday code and repo tasks
descriptions.factory-droid: Factory's autonomous coding agent for larger implementation tasks

editor.emptyHint: Open a file from the explorer or click a file in the chat

gitDiff.unavailable: Git compare is unavailable for this tab.
gitDiff.binaryUnavailable: Editable diff is unavailable for binary files.
gitDiff.deletedReadOnly: This file was deleted in the working tree. The compare stays read-only.
gitDiff.deletedNotice: This file was deleted. The right side remains empty and read-only.
gitDiff.conflictedNotice: This file is conflicted. The compare stays read-only until the conflict is resolved.
gitDiff.noDifferences: No differences against the current compare base.

toasts.openExternalFailed: Failed to open file in the default app

rename.errorInvalid: Enter a valid file or folder name

delete.folderMessage: "{{name}}" and all its contents will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
delete.bulkMessage: The following will be permanently deleted:
delete.unsavedChanges_one: This will also discard unsaved changes in {{count}} open tab.
delete.unsavedChanges_other: This will also discard unsaved changes in {{count}} open tabs.

overview.title: Settings
overview.description: Control Panes, terminal sessions, agent alerts, and the current workspace from one place.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Panes looks and which language it uses.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Set defaults for terminal sessions created in Panes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose when Panes alerts you about completed chat replies and terminal agents.

usage.title: Usage limits
usage.description: Review the current account limits reported by connected chat providers.

power.title: Power and wake
power.description: Keep the computer available while agents and terminal jobs are running.

about.title: About and updates
about.description: View the installed Panes version and manage application updates.

workspace-general.title: Workspace general
workspace-general.description: Control how Panes opens and scans the selected workspace.

workspace-repos.title: Repositories
workspace-repos.description: Choose which repositories appear in Git tools and how much access each repository permits.

workspace-startup.title: Startup layout
workspace-startup.description: Choose which surfaces and terminal sessions Panes restores when this workspace opens.

overview.setupDescription: Install the Claude Code or Codex hooks to receive completed turn alerts from Panes terminals.
overview.quickControlsDescription: The settings most likely to change during a working session.
overview.keepAwakeActive: Active until you turn it off
overview.noWorkspace: Open a workspace to manage workspace settings.
overview.workspaceGeneralDescription: Path, repository discovery, and workspace information
overview.repositoriesDescription: Trust levels, Git visibility, and remotes
overview.startupDescription: Default view, terminal tabs, panes, and worktrees

appearance.interfaceDescription: Theme changes apply to chat, terminal, Git, and editor surfaces.
appearance.themeDescription: Use a fixed theme or follow the operating system.
appearance.languageDescription: Used across navigation, dialogs, and status messages.

usage.providerLimitsDescription: Percentages come directly from each provider and refresh every minute.
usage.unavailable: Usage data unavailable. Check that this provider is signed in with a subscription account.
usage.loadFailed: Provider usage limits could not be loaded.

terminal.displayDescription: These preferences apply to every Panes terminal.
terminal.fontDescription: Adjust terminal text without changing the rest of the interface.
terminal.acceleratedDescription: Use WebGL for smoother output in active terminal sessions.
terminal.previewOutput: TypeScript check completed with no errors.

power.optionsDescription: Configure display, battery, session, and lid-close behavior.
power.displaySummary: Control display sleep and screen saver prevention.
power.sourceSummary: Pause on battery or below a chosen battery level.
power.advancedSummary: Set session duration and lid-close behavior.
power.sessionDescription: Choose how long Keep Awake stays active.
power.durationDescription: Stop automatically after a preset or custom duration.
power.customDurationDescription: Enter the number of hours and minutes.

about.applicationDescription: Version and update information for this Panes installation.
about.installedVersionDescription: The version of Panes currently running on this device.
about.automaticDescription: Panes checks for updates automatically. You can also check at any time.
about.checkingDescription: Looking for a newer version of Panes.
about.downloadingUnknown: Downloaded {{downloaded}}. The server did not provide a total size.
about.installingDescription: Download complete. Panes is applying the update.
about.readyDescription: The update is installed and Panes is restarting.

notificationSettings.title: Agent notifications
notificationSettings.description: Control chat reply alerts and terminal agent alerts separately. Terminal tools need one-time setup before Panes can surface their notifications.
notificationSettings.descriptionShort: Desktop alerts for chat replies and terminal agents.

chatCard.title: Chat reply notifications
chatCard.description: Show a desktop notification when a Panes chat thread finishes in the background.
chatCard.descriptionShort: Notify when a chat thread finishes in the background.
chatCard.detail: No extra setup required. Panes can notify for chat replies immediately.

terminalCard.title: Terminal agent notifications
terminalCard.description: Show desktop notifications for Panes terminal activity, including OSC alerts and optional Claude Code or Codex integrations.
terminalCard.descriptionShort: Notify for terminal activity. OSC works immediately; Claude and Codex need one-time setup.
terminalCard.ready: Terminal integrations are installed. You can turn terminal alerts on whenever you want.
terminalCard.setupRequired: Install at least one terminal integration below before enabling terminal alerts.

notificationSettings.workflowDescription: OSC notifications work immediately in Panes terminals. Claude Code and Codex need a one-time config install, and those commands only deliver alerts from terminals launched by Panes.
notificationSettings.workflowShort: OSC works immediately. Claude and Codex hooks are written to your config and only fire from terminals launched by Panes.
notificationSettings.setupRequired: Install at least one terminal integration before turning terminal alerts on.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Plays when a notification is delivered.

notificationSettings.footerNote: Chat notifications are controlled entirely in Panes. Terminal integrations stay installed until you replace them in Claude or Codex config.

claude.title: Claude Code
claude.description: Merge Panes hook commands into your Claude user settings
claude.detail: Adds Panes lifecycle hooks without removing your existing Claude hooks.

codex.title: Codex CLI
codex.description: Write Panes notify config into your Codex user config
codex.detail: Sets Codex's notify command so completed turns can reach Panes.

powerModal.title: Power Management
powerModal.keepAwakeDescription: Prevent idle system sleep while Panes is open
powerModal.displayLinkedNote: These are linked on your platform
powerModal.preventClosedDisplaySleepDescription: Keep the system awake when the lid is closed. Requires a background helper.
powerModal.helperApprovalNote: Open System Settings → General → Login Items to approve.
powerModal.helperPasswordFallback: A password prompt will appear when activating lid-close prevention.
